name: Oconomowoc Bancshares, Inc.
summary: Oconomowoc Bancshares, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Bank Five Nine that provides banking products and services. It offers checking, savings, kids, and individual retirement accounts; certificates of deposit; and debit, credit, and pre-paid cards. The company also provides home, personal, business, and commercial real estate loans; and mortgages, home equity lines of credit, business line of credit, standby letters of credit, SBA lending, and overdraft services, as well as paycheck protection programs. In addition, it offers cash and wealth management services, and online and mobile banking services. The company is based in Oconomowoc, Wisconsin.
